label: Job giver exit map
description: Abstract base job giver that directs the pawn to exit the map. Covers ExitMapRandom, ExitMapBest, and ExitMapNearDutyTarget.

defaultLocomotion.label: Default locomotion
defaultLocomotion.description: Locomotion urgency used for the exit path.

canFlyOutOfMap.label: Can fly out of map
canFlyOutOfMap.description: If true, flying pawns may exit the map by flying rather than walking to the edge.

jobMaxDuration.label: Job max duration
jobMaxDuration.description: Maximum ticks before the exit job expires.

canBash.label: Can bash
canBash.description: If true, the pawn may bash doors and fences on the exit path.

failIfCantJoinOrCreateCaravan.label: Fail if can't join or create caravan
failIfCantJoinOrCreateCaravan.description: If true, the job fails when the pawn cannot join or create a caravan on exit.

forceCanDig.label: Force can dig
forceCanDig.description: If true, the pawn always digs through blocking structures on its exit path.

forceCanDigIfCantReachMapEdge.label: Force can dig if can't reach map edge
forceCanDigIfCantReachMapEdge.description: If true, the pawn digs through blockers only when it cannot reach the map edge by normal pathing.

forceCanDigIfAnyHostileActiveThreat.label: Force can dig if any hostile active threat
forceCanDigIfAnyHostileActiveThreat.description: If true, the pawn digs through blockers when any hostile active threat is present on the map.
